S.FORM: Vladimir Putin Mntucing hngkawas 1952 idas 10 jiyax 7 ka Vladimir Putin ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Russia ta sayang o kiya ka Vladimir Putin, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 5 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: *ladimiɾ putin mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * ka *ladimiɾ putin ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ɾussia ta sajaŋ o kija ka *ladimiɾ putin, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnatas
